properties.remark: ROOF DAMAGE TO 2 STRUCTURES

EF-1 TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN AND CAUSED SIGNIFICANT ROOF DAMAGE TO A SINGLE FAMILY HOME AND AN APARTMENT COMPLEX. ADDITIONAL MINOR ROOF DAMAGE WAS SUSTAINED AT TWO ADJACENT SINGLE FAMILY HOMES. ADDITIONAL MINOR DAMAGE WAS SUSTAINED AT A CONVENIENCE STORE TO THE ROOF AND NEARBY TREES. WINDS ESTIMATED AT 95 MPH WITH A PATH LENGTH OF 0.75 MILES AND A WIDTH OF 20 YARDS. ASSESSMENT BASED ON COLLABORATION WITH CHARLOTTE COUNTY EM.
